raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Aliso Canyon natural gas storage facility experienced the largest methane leak in U.S. history.",
    "The proposal to increase storage at Aliso Canyon is premature given ongoing investigations into the causes of winter gas price spikes.",
    "SoCalGas claims that increased use of the Aliso Canyon gas field will lower prices, but there are unanswered questions about this assertion.",
    "SoCalGas did not utilize the available gas storage at Aliso Canyon during last year's price spike, opting instead to purchase more expensive gas.",
    "There is insufficient evidence connecting the Aliso Canyon capacity to the price of natural gas.",
    "The maximum capacity of the Aliso Canyon facility was reduced as a safety precaution following the 2015 leak."
  ]
}
```
